name: Weavefrom PP
preceding_figure_names: Hover Telemark to PP, Open Impetus, Open Telemark, Natural Turn, Outside Swivel and Feather Ending, Three Step, Change Of Direction
following_figure_names: Three Step, Change Of Direction, Hover Telemark, Reverse Wave, Fallaway Reverse and Slip Pivot (at corner)
notes:
Note -- On step 4 the Footwork of TH may be used. The Rise on 5 will then be "Up NFR".
Alternate alignments for the Weave from PP may be found in the Waltz charts.

steps.action: RF fwd in PP and CBMP
comments: feet, low center, high center: the offset position of these 3 points must be maintained through PP and weave.
Angle left shoulder and hip down, do not pull weight back.

steps.action: RF to side and slightly back
comments: Energy still moves diagonal center. Do not think about BLOD.

steps.action: LF fwd and across in PP and CBMP
comments: Body doesn't turn till second step.

steps.action: RF to side and slightly back
comments: Depends on how Man shapes. Head can keep left or right. Head following the arc.
If shaping to R, keep head position, turn body underneath (base rotate), effectively, head will shape to right during weave.
Think step forward and it will end in "side and slightly back".
